sum: This mod adds a bard profile, the cantor, who casts divine spells instead of arcane ones, can cast spells in armor and can choose between several powerful chants.
no: This mod adds a bard profile, the cantor, who casts divine spells instead of arcane ones, can cast spells in armor and can choose between several powerful chants.

co.n: Chanter gains cleric stronghold instead of bard one [EXPERIMENTAL]
